description_long: This is a modern countertop microwave oven with a rectangular, boxy form and a matte dark gray exterior. The front face features a large, black-tinted window set into the door, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel with several round and rectangular buttons, a prominent rotary dial, and a small digital display, all arranged in a clean, functional layout. The microwave's surfaces are smooth and hard, with subtle metallic highlights along the edges, suggesting a steel or aluminum construction. No visible vents are present on the sides or top, indicating they may be located on the rear or bottom. The overall design is minimalist and utilitarian, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A sleek, dark gray microwave oven with a large front window and a vertical control panel featuring buttons and a rotary dial. The design is minimalist and modern, with smooth metallic surfaces.
description_view_0: The left side of the microwave is visible, showing a plain, unadorned matte surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The rear or opposite side of the microwave is shown, featuring a flat, featureless surface with no visible controls, windows, or vents.
description_view_2: The right side of the microwave is visible, similar to the left, with a smooth, uninterrupted matte finish and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main interactive features: a large black window on the door, a vertical control panel with buttons and a rotary dial, and subtle metallic trim.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, subtle brand logo is present in the upper right corner of the front panel, rendered in a light color that contrasts with the dark surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a small digital display at the top, followed by a round rotary dial, several round and rectangular push buttons arranged in a column, and two larger rectangular buttons at the bottom. The layout is intuitive and clearly separated from the door area.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, forming a vertical recessed grip that runs nearly the full height of the door. It is made of the same material as the door, with a slightly different texture for tactile feedback.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents are present on the top, sides, or front; vents are likely located on the rear or bottom, out of view in these images.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, black-tinted window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
